column1: # TIFF decode peak-memory sweep — host=lilith commit=27256d2 date=2026-06-23
# tool: examples/mem_probe.rs (marginal WS = VmHWM_after_decode - VmRSS_before) + heaptrack peak-heap cross-check
# env: GLIBC_TUNABLES=glibc.malloc.mmap_threshold=131072 ; one process per cell ; run-heavy serial
#   FACTOR = 1  for 8-bit interleaved Gray/GrayA/RGB/RGBA (image-tiff U8 buffer MOVED into output)
#   FACTOR = 2  for CMYK/palette/16-bit/sub-byte (image-tiff source + converted dest held concurrently)
# (palette fixture hit a separate zentiff 'RGBPalette 8bps unsupported' decode gap — unmeasured)
